browserSearchPath: CLMS Bio-geophysical Parameters, Temperature and Reflectance, Land Surface Temperature
collectionDescription: Provides Land Surface Temperature estimates at global scale, at a spatial resolution of ~3 km. More information here.

layers.shortDescription: Median of Land Surface Temperature observed during the 10-days period, regardless the time of the day.
layers.longDescription: Median of Land Surface Temperature observed during the 10-days period, regardless the time of the day. Expressed in Kelvin.

layers.shortDescription: Thermal Condition Index for the compositing period.
layers.longDescription: Thermal Condition Index for the compositing period, estimated using LST observations around local solar noon.
Fraction of valid observations as used to calculate the minimum, median and maximum temperature values, regardless the time of the day.

layers.shortDescription: Minimum of Land Surface Temperature observed during the 10-days period, regardless the time of the day.
layers.longDescription: Minimum of Land Surface Temperature observed during the 10-days period, regardless the time of the day. Expressed in Kelvin.

layers.shortDescription: Maximum of Land Surface Temperature observed during the 10-days period, regardless the time of the day.
layers.longDescription: Maximum of Land Surface Temperature observed during the 10-days period, regardless the time of the day. Expressed in Kelvin.
